title: polygala perdurans
intro: Polygala perdurans, also known as Yin Yang Huo, is a type of plant that belongs to the polygalaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala perdurans include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, and are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
